notes: The older 2026-04-16 snapshot is preserved as a historical snapshot and does not fully reflect later transformer fine-tuning.
The final thesis should use transformer_v1 (image-only) and transformer_text_v1 (multimodal) as the official checkpoints.
transformer_text_v2 remained slightly below transformer_text_v1 on test_mse and is not adopted as the final multimodal checkpoint.
